data.name: IFFManager_ReadySelectTheIFFFilesDirectory
data.value: Ready. Select the IFF files directory.

data.name: IFFManager_SelectAnIffFileFromThe
data.value: Select an .iff file from the list to load the editing table.

data.name: IFFManager_SelectTheExtractedFolderContainingThe
data.value: Select the extracted folder containing the .iff files (e.g.: Character.iff, Item.iff)

data.name: IFFManager_NoFileWithTheIffExtension
data.value: No file with the '.iff' extension was found in this folder.

data.name: IFFManager_TheEditorLayoutStructureForThe
data.value: ⚠️ The editor layout/structure for the file

data.name: IFFManager_HasNotYetBeenImplementedOr
data.value: has not yet been implemented or mapped.

data.name: Options_AddSuiteToolsShellContextToWindows
data.value: Add SuiteTools shell context to Windows Explorer

data.name: Options_SuiteToolsHasToBeStartedAs
data.value: SuiteTools has to be started "As Administrator" to be able to modify the shell entries!

data.name: PakMaker_SelectSingleFileToRename
data.value: Select exactly one file to rename.

data.name: PakMaker_InvalidRenameName
data.value: Enter a valid file name without path separators.

data.name: PakMaker_RenameProcess
data.value: Processing new paths and updating PAK file...

data.name: PakMaker_RenameNotFound
data.value: No matching item was located in the PAK tree.

data.name: PakMaker_RenamePhysicalFailed
data.value: Failed during the physical restructuring of the PAK file:

data.name: PakMaker_InvalidCharacters
data.value: The entered name contains invalid characters or folder separators.

data.name: PakMaker_PleaseDragAValidPakFile
data.value: Please drag a valid .pak file extension to open.

data.name: PakMaker_NoValidFilesOrFoldersWere
data.value: No valid files or folders were found for injection.

data.name: PakMaker_PleaseDragAValidFolderTo
data.value: Please drag a valid folder to compile a new PAK.

data.name: PakMaker_YouCannotDeleteTheRootFolder
data.value: You cannot delete the root folder. Select a specific folder.

data.name: PakMaker_NoFilesFoundInsideThisFolder
data.value: No files found inside this folder to delete.

data.name: PakMaker_ThePAKWillBeRebuiltAnd
data.value: The PAK will be rebuilt and a backup (.bak) will be created automatically.

data.name: PakMaker_TheFolderAndItsItemsWere
data.value: The folder and its items were removed successfully!

data.name: PakMaker_SelectFilesFromTheListOr
data.value: Select files from the list or a folder from the treeview to extract.

data.name: PakMaker_FolderExtractedRespectingTheSelectedLevel
data.value: Folder extracted respecting the selected level!

data.name: PakMaker_SelectTheDestinationFolderForThe
data.value: Select the destination folder for the selected files

data.name: PakMaker_SelectTheFolderThatCONTAINSThe
data.value: Select the folder that CONTAINS the .pak files

data.name: PakMaker_NoPakFilesWereFoundIn
data.value: No .pak files were found in the selected folder.

data.name: PakMaker_SelectTheDESTINATIONFolderForExtraction
data.value: Select the DESTINATION folder for extraction

data.name: PakMaker_TheAuthorFieldIsEmptyDo
data.value: The Author field is empty. Do you want to reset the author name to 'PakMaker'?

data.name: PakMaker_FileSInjectedAndThePAK
data.value: file(s) injected and the PAK was rebuilt!

data.name: PakMaker_NoValidFileWasFoundTo
data.value: No valid file was found to inject.

data.name: PakMaker_SelectFilesFromTheListOr_2
data.value: Select files from the list or check folder boxes from the treeview to remove.

data.name: PakMaker_TheSelectedItemsWereRemovedSuccessfully
data.value: The selected items were removed successfully and the PAK file was rebuilt!

data.name: PakMaker_PleaseSelectAValidRegionBefore
data.value: Please select a valid region before continuing.

data.name: PakMaker_ThePAKIsAlreadyUsingThat
data.value: The PAK is already using that key.

data.name: PakMaker_ThePAKWillBeRebuiltAnd_2
data.value: The PAK will be rebuilt and a backup (.bak) will be created.

data.name: PakMaker_ThePAKWasRebuiltWithThe
data.value: The PAK was rebuilt with the key from

data.name: UpdateList_ViewerPathHint
data.value: Drag an updatelist file here or click Browse...

data.name: UpdateList_NoRawXmlLoaded
data.value: No updatelist XML has been loaded.

data.name: UpdateList_DragAndDropAnEncryptedUpdatelist
data.value: 🪂 Drag and drop an encrypted 'updatelist' file here to view the decoded XML in real time.

data.name: UpdateList_InterfaceInitializedInMultiTabMode
data.value: Interface initialized in multi-tab mode (PakMaker style). Ready to use.

data.name: UpdateList_ErrorNoKeyDecodedTheStructure
data.value: ❌ Error: No key decoded the structure.

data.name: UpdateList_NoKeyFromTheKnownDatabase
data.value: No key from the known database was able to open this file's structure.

data.name: UpdateList_TheDroppedFileIsAlreadyIn
data.value: The dropped file is already in plain text/XML mode. Displayed formatted in the panel.

data.name: UpdateList_SelectTheRootPangyaFolderWhere
data.value: Select the root Pangya folder (where the executables and .pak files are)

data.name: UpdateList_SelectTheDestinationWebServerFolderFor
data.value: Select the destination WebServer folder for the Update

data.name: UpdateList_CheckWhetherTheSourceAndWebServer
data.value: Check whether the Source and WebServer Destination folders are valid directory paths.

data.name: UpdateList_ScanningDirectoryTreeAndGeneratingInitial
data.value: Scanning directory tree and generating initial client mapping...

data.name: Program_ThisApplicationRequiresAdministrativePrivilegesTo
data.value: This application requires Administrative privileges to run correctly. Please restart and click 'Yes'.

data.name: Pak_PathHint
data.value: Drag a .pak file here or click Browse...

data.name: Options_Shell
data.value: Add SuiteTools shell context to Windows Explorer

data.name: Options_Admin
data.value: SuiteTools has to be started "As Administrator" to be able to modify the shell entries!

data.name: Pak_RemoveFolderConfirmation
data.value: Are you sure you want to remove the folder '{0}' and all of its contents? Total files to delete: {1}.

data.name: Pak_ChangeAuthorConfirmation
data.value: Do you want to change the author name to '{0}'?

data.name: Pak_RemoveFoldersConfirmation
data.value:
You are about to remove the checked folder(s): '{0}' and/or selected files. Total files to delete: {1}.
Do you want to continue?

data.name: Pak_FilenameEncodingTooltip
data.value: Encoding used to read and write filenames inside PAK archives.

data.name: Pak_EncodingAppliesNextLoad
data.value: The filename encoding will be used the next time a PAK is loaded.

data.name: PakDiff_NoLogToSave
data.value: No log to save. Run a comparison first.

data.name: PakDiff_SelectValidClientFolders
data.value: Select valid directories for both clients.

data.name: PakDiff_SelectAtLeastOne
data.value: Please check at least one file to extract.

data.name: PakDiff_SnapshotNotTaken
data.value: Snapshot {0} has not been taken yet.

data.name: PakDiff_Title
data.value: PAK Diff — Change History & Multi-Client Sync

data.name: IFFManager_Saved
data.value: IFF saved successfully. A backup was created.

data.name: IFFManager_InvalidValue
data.value: The value is invalid for this field.

data.name: IFFManager_ConfirmOverwrite
data.value: Overwrite the selected IFF? The original will be retained as a .bak file.

data.name: IFFManager_NoChanges
data.value: There are no IFF changes to save.

data.name: IFFManager_NoEditableEntryLoaded
data.value: Save cannot start because no editable IFF entry is loaded.

data.name: IFFManager_EncodingAppliesNextLoad
data.value: The selected string encoding will apply the next time an IFF is loaded.

data.name: IFFManager_MaximumRows
data.value: An IFF file cannot contain more than 65,535 rows.

data.name: PakMaker_SSKeyNotSupported
data.value: This PAK uses pakkeys.ss. Files using this key cannot currently be unpacked.

data.name: IFFManager_ColumnNameRequired
data.value: Enter a name for the column.

data.name: IFFManager_DuplicateColumnName
data.value: A column with that name already exists.

data.name: IFFManager_OnlyCustomColumnsEditable
data.value: Only hexadecimal and checkbox columns can be edited with this dialog.

data.name: IFFManager_SchemaRequiresColumn
data.value: An IFF schema must contain at least one column.

data.name: IFFManager_SchemaWarning
data.value: The IFF was opened as read-only raw data because its JSON schema could not be loaded.

data.name: IFFManager_RegionAppliesNextLoad
data.value: The selected region will be used the next time an IFF is loaded.

data.name: IFFManager_SoundFileNotFound
data.value: The sound file could not be found from the selected data folder.

data.name: IFFManager_SelectContiguousBytes
data.value: Select one contiguous range of bytes.

data.name: IFFManager_FormUnsavedChanges
data.value: Apply changes to the current record before switching records?

data.name: PakMaker_BatchFolderStructureChoice
data.value:
Create a separate folder for each PAK?
Yes: Keep the current structure (destination\PAK name\files). No: Write all files directly under the destination using their internal paths. Files from later PAKs may overwrite earlier files. Cancel: Stop the extraction.

data.name: Shop_SelectDataFolder
data.value: Select the extracted PangYa data folder.

data.name: Shop_MissingRequiredFile
data.value: A required shop file is missing.

data.name: Shop_NoItems
data.value: No saleable items with available icons were found.

data.name: Shop_CartSummary
data.value: Cart: {0} item(s) Pang total: {1:N0} Cookie total: {2:N0}

data.name: Shop_ConfirmPurchase
Shop_MissingIconsSkipped
data.value: Skipped {0} catalog record(s) whose icon could not be resolved.

data.name: Shop_EditSaved
data.value: The IFF item was saved successfully.

data.name: Shop_EditFailed
data.value: Could not save the IFF item: {0}

data.name: Shop_SelectIcon
data.value: Select an icon from the extracted data folder

data.name: Shop_IconMustBeInData
data.value: The selected icon must already be inside the extracted data folder so the game can resolve it.

data.name: Shop_EditHint
data.value: Click an icon to replace it. Right-click an item to edit its prices.

data.name: UpdateList_InvalidSourceFolder
data.value: The Pangya source folder is invalid.

data.name: UpdateList_InvalidDestinationFolder
data.value: The WebServer destination folder is invalid.

data.name: UpdateList_PatchVersionRequired
data.value: Please fill in the Patch Version.
